text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! The Arima Kinen has finally arrived!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A stage where only the best and most popular of
Umamusume can compete—perfect for me, I must
say!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right! My elegant victory will end yet
another year on a strong note.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Because I'm a first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Supporting Fan
text_block_list.text: King! You got this today!

text_block_list.name: Enthusiastic Fan
text_block_list.text: Don't lose to anyone! Do your best, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe... I have to admit I'm loving all this
attention.)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
(With a win at the Arima Kinen bringing the year
to a perfect close, I'll be showered in even more
glorious attention.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, it looks like King has finally graced us with
her presence.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I haven't seen you since the holiday. Glad to
know you're doing well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I'm so glad all of my fine opponents from
throughout the year have gathered here to race.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This fierce battle, this grand contest, this
miraculous meeting—it's our destiny!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is this? Almost everyone is here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not "almost."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Did ya forget about me, King? I hope not, 'cause
I don't plan on losing today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm the rival of both of you. I have to win!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, you can certainly talk the talk, but can you walk the walk?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For goodness' sake, I was supposed to be the sole
star of this year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh well. Come on, then.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You'll all serve well as my backup dancers for
today's show!
